No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (Target 4.3) and fosters global citizenship and cultural appreciation through learning German language and culture (Target 4.7), directly aligning with quality education goals.

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to clean water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course supports students planning to study or exchange in Germany, which can enhance future employment opportunities and contribute to economic growth (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course facilitates international mobility for students (Target 10.7) and promotes intercultural inclusion by encouraging making German friends (Target 10.2), reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course fosters interest in German language and culture, including 'cultural local customs,' which strengthens efforts to safeguard cultural heritage (Target 11.4).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The syllabus explicitly states '尊重版權所有!' (respect copyright), which is a minimal but direct link to ethical consumption of intellectual property (Goal 12).

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to peace, justice, or strong institutions.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Learning German enables students to become exchange students or make German friends, serving as a foundational tool for global partnerships and intercultural cooperation (Target 17.16).
